channel.title: Secure-Partition on Neeraj's Tech Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Secure-Partition on Neeraj's Tech Lab

item.title: Making Variables Survive Reboot — Enabling StandaloneMM on ARM RD-N2 FVP
item.description: The complete story of enabling persistent UEFI variables on the ARM RD-N2 FVP — from understanding the Secure Partition Manager to debugging a stack pointer that was never initialized, and finally watching a variable survive a full power cycle.
